title: Mo' Crafting Recipes
description: Adds 76+ Crafting Recipes to Minecraft, Including 2 New Items and Other Methods to Crafting
body:
**Mo' Crafting Recipes** is the perfect mod for players who want more control over their resources! Ever struggled to get a saddle or wished you could craft music discs? This mod adds 76+ new crafting recipes for items that normally can't be crafted, making it easier than ever to get what you need.

In addition to new recipes, Mo' Crafting Recipes introduces two unique items:

- Light Core – A key component used alongside netherite and a smithing template to craft the Heavy Core.
- Empty Disc – Allows players to craft all 17 music discs in the game!
  
**Recommended to use Just Enough Items**
 
**Check Gallery for Recipes if Needed**



## Added Recipes:

- Cobblestone
- Sand
- Gravel
- Gold Ore
- Iron Ore
- Coal Ore
- Lapis Lazuli Ore
- Diamond Ore

Please use in your modpacks! 

Last Updated: 3/8/25
Created using mod maker, MCreator
